sme_comments: The Client Contact Note (CCN) is missing key details required for a complete and compliant record. Several of the Five Ws are incomplete or missing, and the rationale/decision-making process is not documented.

possible_solicitation.reason: The note indicates the meeting was initiated by the Account Holder, which suggests Reverse Solicitation.
possible_solicitation.rm_next_action: Confirm the client's request for the advisory session and document the specific services/actions discussed and agreed upon.

missing_info: The names and roles of all participants (e.g., Account Holder, RM, etc.)
The specific operations/decisions agreed upon during the meeting
The rationale and client's understanding for the agreed actions
The date and time of the meeting
follow_up_questions: Who were the participants in the meeting (names and roles)?
What were the specific operations/decisions agreed upon during the meeting?
What was the client's rationale and understanding for the agreed actions?
When did the meeting take place (date and time)?
suggested_ccn: On [DATE] at [TIME], a meeting was held at our offices between [NAME] (Account Holder) and [NAME] (Relationship Manager). The purpose of the meeting was to conduct an advisory session, during which the following operations were discussed and agreed upon: [OPERATIONS/DECISIONS]. The client's rationale and understanding for these agreed actions was: [RATIONALE]. The meeting was initiated by the client, and no cross-border activity was involved.
